goal: Fix scatter card edge-crop + cards-invisible; add shuffle motion
done: (1) EDGE-CUT: scatter .card-slot now uses aspect-ratio: var(--mt-card-ratio) (deck back ratio) with height:auto instead of a fixed w×h that mismatched the art -> object-fit:cover now fills the back with no crop. (2) VISIBLE: the base .card-slot is opacity:0 (revealed by the grid deal animation, which scatter skips) -> added opacity:1 !important so scatter cards always show (they were invisible once the masking entrance animation was removed). (3) SHUFFLE motion: cards GLIDE to new positions via the left/top transition (0.38s) on re-shuffle. Selected-card lift + full-art verified. The staggered entrance-fade cascade was dropped — it fought the base opacity:0 and left cards invisible; the glide is the shuffle motion.
verified: render: full card-back art (no crop), scattered, 1 selected lifted
notes: Entrance fade-in cascade intentionally dropped (invisibility trap with base opacity:0). Daily/Full share the same scatter CSS.
